name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset reduces over the offset window via a valid table re-scan
description: player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + range year_offset=[1,2] reduces the offset window with a correlated-aggregate subquery that re-scans scoring_format_player_projection_points directly (source.table), pinned to year IN (2024,2025) plus the scoring_format_id/week discriminators. Previously emitted invalid SQL referencing an unjoined alias.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(scoring_format_player_projection_points.total) FROM scoring_format_player_projection_points WHERE scoring_format_player_projection_points.pid = player.pid AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.year IN (2024,2025) AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.scoring_format_id = 'draftkings' AND scoring_format_player_projection_points.week = '0') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
